MASTER CALENDAR ON JAN-18-2022. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTY. TERENCE ANTHONY REDMOND SET FOR FEB-25-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JAN-18-2022 - APPEARANCES BY TERRENCE A. REDMOND, ESQ. FOR PLAINTIFF KATHLEEN JENSEN; CLAY A. COELHO, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT BAYSHORE AMBULANCE, INC. -- THE COURT ASSIGNED A MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE TO JUDGE ANN-CHRISTINE MASSULLO IN DEPT. 304. PARTIES WERE ORDERED TO CONTACT DEPT. 304 BY EMAIL BY 4:00 PM TODAY FOR SCHEDULING OF THE MSC. IF THE CASE DOES NOT SETTLE, PARTIES ORDERED TO RETURN FOR TRIAL CALL ON JUN-08-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE OF THE TRIAL DATE. DISCOVERY IS CLOSED. SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, PAYABLE BY FEB-24-2022, IS IMPOSED ON ATTY. TERRENCE A. REDMOND FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS SET ON FEB-25-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. OSC WILL BE DISCHARGED IF SANCTIONS ARE PAID PRIOR TO THE HEARING DATE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: JIROQUE; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jul-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. CODY B.K. SALFEN, ESQ. of The Salfen Law Firm appearing as the moving party;
ALSO PRESENT: KATHLEEN JENSEN, wife to deceased plaintiff Harry Jensen.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF HARRY JENSEN.

The Court's tentative ruling required the parties to appear at today's hearing.

The Court and the parties discuss the matter.

The Court rules as follows: The Court grants the motion for withdrawal of attorney of record as to plaintiff Harry Jensen.

The Court signs a formal order.

The Court asks Mr. Salfen to please orient Ms. Jensen as to the future Case Management Conference set in this case.
